questions.question: Describe the type of evaluation order used in the SLR parsing algorithm. (5 marks)
questions.hint: SLR parsing algorithm uses left-to-right, top-down evaluation order.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using an evaluation order in LR parsing algorithms? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a clear explanation of the benefits of using an evaluation order in LR parsing algorithms.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the evaluation orders used in the LR(1) and LR(2) parsing algorithms. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Clearly outline the differences between the evaluation orders used in LR(1) and LR(2) parsing algorithms.
